Impact Statements.statement: Executed a seamless migration of a legacy Shark bite victims database to AWS server, optimizing storage and database performance.
Leveraged D3.js framework to create comprehensive data visualizations based on shark attacks and geolocations.
Employed Splunk for monitoring and analytics, enhancing system performance.
Designed a fully functional web application to retrieve files from Amazon S3 buckets, enabling efficient real-time traffic monitoring for over 100 traffic intersections.
Employed a high-availability deployment strategy using Nginx and Docker services on AWS, ensuring 0 downtime.
Designed and implemented RESTful endpoint APIs utilizing Kotlin and DynamoDB, resulting in optimized APIs with 30% faster response time and achieving 99.9% uptime.
Conducted thorough unit and integration testing with MockK and Mockito frameworks, achieving a 30% reduction in the number of defects discovered in production.
Improved code readability through klint code formatting and reduced code review time by 20%.
Created efficient connectivity code between the data and control plane layers, leveraging Java and Splunk, leading to a 50% reduction in data access latency.
Implemented efficient automation solutions across various Business Intelligence platforms, resulting in a 30% reduction in manual effort and improved data accuracy.
Designed and deployed over 50 micro-solutions using Python to streamline the migration of Cognos to new data centers, reducing migration time by 50%.
Created a cloud-based self-service portal that empowered users to manage their data, accounts, and reports independently, leading to a 40% decrease in support ticket volume.
Designed and deployed a Flask web app with a UI enabling users to run Kubernetes operations using plain English commands.
Participated in the deployment of a scalable load balancer on AWS using Ansible, optimized to support a million users.
Designed and implemented a robotic electronics blog, attracting organic monthly traffic of 10,000 users.
